mapper.sql: id, policy_code, policy_name, per_second, per_minute, time_window, status, remark
mapper.insert: insert into rate_limit_policies(policy_code, policy_name, per_second, per_minute, time_window, status, remark) values(#{policyCode}, #{policyName}, #{perSecond}, #{perMinute}, #{timeWindow}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update rate_limit_policies set policy_name = #{policyName}, per_second = #{perSecond}, per_minute = #{perMinute}, time_window = #{timeWindow}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
